overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district. The player character walks along covered sidewalks, crosses a street at a crosswalk, and gazes up at towering skyscrapers covered in massive holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along rain-soaked sidewalk beneath dark building overhang, approaching street intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall dark glass facade building with reflective windows running along the left side of the walkway
street sign with 'NOKOTA' text mounted on overhead structure
green and red neon light strips illuminating the building facade
rain-soaked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights
tall street lamp with bright overhead light

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a covered sidewalk beneath a dark glass building. Neon strip lights illuminate the left facade while the NOKOTA street sign hangs overhead. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights, and a pedestrian with an umbrella approaches from the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with traffic control

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto open street crosswalk exposed to rain
crossing yellow-striped crosswalk while vehicles wait at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and dark shorts crossing alongside camera
pedestrian with umbrella waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt
traffic signal showing red light for vehicles
illuminated sign with 'MACROWARE' text on building facade
tall buildings with neon signage on the far side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway and enters the open intersection crosswalk. Yellow striped crossing lines cover the wet asphalt as the camera crosses with other pedestrians. A red traffic light stops vehicles while the MACROWARE sign becomes visible on the left building.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with neon storefronts and protective railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and large holographic displays

entered.detail: green metal railing separating sidewalk from the street
massive cyan-colored holographic advertisement displaying on building facade
bright yellow neon sign with 'YUKEN' text

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk protected by a green metal railing, the camera passes various neon storefronts. The large cyan holographic billboard dominates the view ahead, while the MACROWARE sign recedes into the distance. The wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: major downtown intersection with towering holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to gaze at towering skyscrapers covered in massive holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: standing at intersection looking up at massive holographic advertisements on surrounding skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella standing at crosswalk corner looking at phone

entered.detail: cluster of extremely tall skyscrapers covered in dense holographic advertisements and neon signage
massive pink holographic display showing a woman's face on the side of a skyscraper
yellow striped crosswalk lines at the new intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at a major downtown intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers blanketed in massive holographic advertisements. The camera tilts upward to reveal the scale of the buildings, with a prominent pink holographic billboard on the right and the cyan billboard now to the left. Pedestrians gather at the crosswalk corners.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban walkway into the overwhelming scale of a neon-drenched downtown intersection. It begins beneath the dark glass of a building, moving along a covered sidewalk where neon strip lights and a NOKOTA sign reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera exits the shelter, it enters an open intersection, crossing yellow striped lines alongside other pedestrians while a red traffic light halts nearby vehicles. The scene then shifts to the opposite sidewalk, passing vibrant storefronts behind a green metal railing as a massive cyan holographic billboard begins to dominate the horizon. Finally, the camera arrives at a major junction and tilts upward, revealing towering skyscrapers blanketed in colossal pink and cyan holographic advertisements that dwarf the crowds gathered below.
